# Vendored browser assets

Leaflet 1.9.4 is pinned from the official npm package distribution at `https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/` so the authenticated editor does not execute third-party CDN scripts. The upstream BSD-2-Clause license is included at `leaflet/LICENSE`.

- `leaflet/leaflet.js`: `db49d009c841f5ca34a888c96511ae936fd9f5533e90d8b2c4d57596f4e5641a`
- `leaflet/leaflet.css`: `a7837102824184820dfa198d1ebcd109ff6d0ff9a2672a074b9a1b4d147d04c6`
